overall.description: A first-person perspective elevator ascent through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, passing through an NCART metro station and revealing aerial views of illuminated city streets and highways. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 game engine with neon-lit buildings and moving traffic visible below.

large structural support beams visible in the shaft

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from inside a glass elevator ascending through a dark, enclosed shaft. The exterior reveals concrete building facades with occasional illuminated office windows passing by, creating a sense of vertical movement through a cyberpunk city structure.

segments.scene_description: The elevator passes through an NCART metro station platform, revealing illuminated signage, digital advertisement billboards, and station infrastructure including turnstiles and a countdown timer. The environment is artificially lit with neon accents typical of cyberpunk transit hubs.

segments.scene_description: The elevator emerges from the station into an open aerial view of the city below. A multi-lane street with palm trees and moving vehicle traffic is visible, alongside a distinctive yellow hexagonal-patterned building wall. The perspective looks down on the urban landscape from an elevated position.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overpass with moving traffic

events.description: view opens from dark shaft to elevated highway with moving traffic light streaks
AVANTE billboard becomes visible on building facade as elevator approaches destination

agents.ego_description: continuing ascent past an elevated highway, observing traffic light trails and large building advertisements

large illuminated advertisement billboard displaying AVANTE brand with imagery
modern glass facade building with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from a dark shaft to reveal an elevated highway with moderate traffic creating light streaks. The elevator passes a large AVANTE advertisement billboard and modern glass buildings as it approaches its destination level, maintaining the cyberpunk city atmosphere with artificial neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vertical ascent from a dark, enclosed elevator shaft into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by gliding past concrete facades and scattered office windows in a dim shaft, creating a sense of claustrophobic verticality. As the elevator rises, the scene opens into the artificial glow of an NCART metro station, passing through a hub of digital billboards, turnstiles, and neon signage. The camera then emerges from the station into an open aerial perspective, revealing a multi-lane street lined with palm trees and a yellow hexagonal-patterned building below. Finally, the view shifts toward an elevated highway with streaming traffic and a large AVANTE billboard, passing modern glass towers as the elevator reaches its destination.
